svg.style: --color-svg-icon: rgb(134, 134, 139); --color-figure-gray-secondary: rgb(110, 110, 115); width: 1em; height: 1em; flex: 0 0 auto; color: var(--color-svg-icon, var(--color-figure-gray-secondary)); font-family: 'SF Pro Text', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', sans-serif;
